$meta.focus: Positioning, Crowd Control, Weakening Effects, Support
$meta.desc_note: VERBATIM game data (0.9.4.x). Damage formulas evaluate with current Magic Power (MP) and Arcanistic Power (ARC). Entropy Flare/Aether Harmony mapping is order-based.

skills.desc: Applies 'Wormhole' 3 turns, marks tile. On expiry/removal teleports target to mark: 8 Arcane Damage (12 + 60% Stun if tile occupied). While active, can recast free to trigger. Not usable on giant/stationary targets.
skills.dyn:
Applies the target with "Wormhole" for 3 turns and marks its tile.

When the effect expires or is removed, teleports the target to the marked tile, dealing {8*(1+(ARC-100)/100)*MP/100} Arcane Damage.

If the marked tile is occupied, teleports the target to the closest empty tile, dealing additional {12*(1+(ARC-100)/100)*MP/100} Arcane Damage and with {60*(MP+ARC)/200}% chance Stunning it.

While "Wormhole" is active, the spell doesn't go on cooldown and can be used again without spending Energy to remove the effect from the target.

The spell can't be used on giant or stationary targets and doesn't harm the caster.

skills.desc: Swaps two targets: 5 Arcane + 1 per tile between them; 80% Confuse 3 turns or Daze 2. Both: -5% WD, -5% Accuracy, +5% Fumble 3 turns (x2).
skills.dyn:
Marks two targets, then teleports them, swapping their positions and dealing {5*(1+(ARC-100)/100)*MP/100} Arcane Damage.

Also deals {1*(1+(ARC-100)/100)*MP/100} Arcane Damage to both targets for each tile of distance between them, and with {80*(MP+ARC)/200}% chance Confuses them for 3 turns or Dazes for 2 turns.

Applies both targets with -{0.5*WIL}% Weapon Damage, -{0.5*WIL}% Accuracy, and +{0.5*WIL}% Fumble Chance for 3 turns.

The effect stacks up to 2 times.

The spell can't be used on giant or stationary targets, doesn't harm the caster, and doesn't apply penalties to entities summoned with Arcanistics.

skills.desc:
Dealing Arcane Damage with strikes, shots, and spells grants +2% Accuracy, -2% Fumble Chance, -2% Backfire Chance, +2% Crit Chance, and +2% Miracle Chance for 4 turns.

The effect stacks up to 3 times.

Teleporting grants +1 Range to Arcanistics spells and -5% Backfire Damage Change for 4 turns.

When "Wormhole" expires or is removed after being applied to the character, replenishes 50% Health and Energy lost over the course of the effect.

When "Wormhole" expires or is removed after being applied to an enemy, deals additional Arcane Damage equal to 33% of the damage they received over the course of the effect.
11 Arcane to 5x5 (minus center); 40% Stagger or Immobilize. 100% knockback adjacent to center, pulls targets 1 tile away.
skills.dyn:
Deals {11*(1+(ARC-100)/100)*MP/100} Arcane Damage to a 5x5 tile area (except the central tile) and with {40*(MP+ARC)/200}% chance Staggers or Immobilizes all affected targets.

With {90*(MP+ARC)/200}% chance knocks back the targets adjacent to the area's center and pulls the targets that are 1 tile away from it.

The spell doesn't harm the caster, aside from Arcane Damage.

skills.desc:
Teleporting enemies burns 10% of their Max Energy and replenishes the same amount of Energy to the character.

Using "Dimensional Shift" on the character or entities summoned with Arcanistics reduces the spell's cooldown by 2 turns.

'Aether Shield' 2 turns (+1 per other learned Arcanistics spell): +30% Control/Move/Bleed Res, -15% Damage Taken, Energy refund 20% of damage taken, destroys all projectiles aimed at caster. Teleporting +3 turns (max 8).
skills.dyn:
Activates "Aether Shield" for 2 turns (+1 turn for each other learned Arcanistics spell):
+{15+1.5*WIL}% Control Resistance
+{15+1.5*WIL}% Move Resistance
+{15+1.5*WIL}% Bleed Resistance
-{10+0.5*WIL}% Damage Taken
Replenishes Energy for 20% of the damage received.
Destroys all physical and magical projectiles (including thrown items) that would hit the caster, preventing their damage and effects.

Teleporting prolongs the effect's duration by 3 turns (up to 8), and each destroyed projectile reduces it by 1 turn.

skills.desc: 'Schism'/Phantasm pull-knockback success: target -10% Magic Res, -10% Arcane Res 3 turns (x2). On fail: 4 Arcane Damage instead.
skills.dyn:
If "Schism" (or "Arcane Tether" of the summoned Phantasm) successfully knocks back or pulls the target, applies it with -10% Magic Resistance and -10% Arcane Resistance for 3 turns.

The effect stacks up to 2 times.

If these spells fail to knock back or pull the target, deals {4*(1+(ARC-100)/100)} Arcane Damage to it instead.

skills.desc: Summons Mana Crystal 8 turns; each turn shoots lowest-HP enemy within 4 tiles: 10 Arcane, 57.5% Accuracy, 10% Armor Pen, 2.5% Crit. Stats scale with caster's, reduced by distance.
skills.dyn:
Summons a Mana Crystal on the targeted tile, which persists for 8 turns.

Each turn, the Crystal shoots a bolt of Aether at the enemy with the lowest Health within 4 tiles, dealing {(1+(ARC-100)/100)*10} Arcane Damage.

The offensive capabilities and Max Health of the Crystal change dynamically depending on the caster's stats, decreasing with distance from the caster.
The Crystal doesn't move and is immune to all effects (except "Stasis" and "Wormhole").

When teleported, the Crystal shoots 3 bolts at random enemies within 4 tiles, distributing them evenly.

skills.desc:
Applies the target with "Stasis" for 3 turns:
+200% Move Resistance
-50% Damage Taken
Immunity to all damage types except Arcane.
Immunity to all effects except "Wormhole".
Can't perform any actions.
Prevents death.
Freezes all cooldowns and the duration of active effects.

When the effect expires or is removed, deals 100% of the Arcane Damage the target received over the course of "Stasis" to a 3x3 tile area, and with 80% chance (scaled by Magic and Arcanistic Power) Dazes all affected targets.

Teleporting a target affected by "Stasis" removes the effect and doubles the chance to Daze.

The spell can't be used on giant targets.

Summons Phantasm 8 turns: 22 Arcane to random adjacent enemy/turn, 57.5% Accuracy, 7.5% Crit. Has Arcane Tether (pull), Mana Siphon (energy steal), Consonance (prolong). Teleporting it refreshes its cooldowns.
skills.dyn:
Summons a Phantasm on the targeted tile, which persists for 8 turns.

Each turn, the Phantasm deals {(1+(ARC-100)/100)*22} Arcane Damage to a random adjacent enemy.

The offensive capabilities and Max Health of the Phantasm change dynamically depending on the caster's stats, decreasing with distance from the caster.
The Phantasm can move within 2 tiles of its summoning or teleportation spot, is immune to all effects (except "Stasis" and "Wormhole"), and replenishes Health upon taking Arcane Damage.

The Phantasm has access to the following abilities: "Arcane Tether", which pulls enemies in, "Mana Siphon", which steals Energy, and "Consonance", which prolongs its summoning duration.

Teleporting the Phantasm instantly refreshes all its cooldowns.

skills.desc:
Teleporting a Mana Crystal grants it +1 Range, +25% Damage, +10% Accuracy, and +25% Damage Reflection for 3 turns.

The effect stacks up to 2 times.

Each strike received by entities summoned with Arcanistics deals Arcane Damage to the attacker equal to 10% of the entities' Max Health.

Once per 10 turns, producing a miracle with "Mana Crystal" instantly refreshes the spell's cooldown and grants it -20% Energy Cost during the next use.
Each entity currently summoned with Arcanistics grants -5% Backfire Damage Change and +10% Magic Power.

When "Stasis" expires or is removed after being applied to the character, it no longer harms them and also activates "Intangibility" for 1 turn, making them untargetable by strikes, shots, and spells.

While "Stasis" is active on the character, grants the effect +50% Arcanistics Power, +25% Miracle Chance, and prevents it from freezing cooldowns.
